title: com-four® 4x Extra flat cooling pack - space-saving and ideal for cool box and cool bag - Large cooling element - Ice pack (04 pieces - large)
features: EXTRA FLAT: The ice packs are only 1 cm high and are particularly flat and space-saving, leaving more storage space for food in the cool box!
PRACTICAL IN EVERYDAY LIFE: Thanks to the long cooling capacity, a cool box or cool bag usually only needs to be equipped with one flat cooling element!
POWERFUL: The space-saving ice batteries are suitable for a temperature range of -18 to +40° and can be reused as often as you like!
FOOD SAFE: In combination with cool boxes or cool bags, not only food and drinks but also medicine can be transported chilled!
CONTENT: 4x cooling pack // Dimensions: approx. 32 x 25.5 x 1 cm (length x width x height) // Weight per battery: approx. 750 g // Color: blue, turquoise, yellow, pink
description: Extra flat cooling pack - space saving and ideal for coolers and insulated bags, large cooling element - ice pack Are you looking for a space-saving ice pack with long-lasting cooling performance? Our very thin cooling elements are ideal and can be placed perfectly in a refrigerator or cooler bag. EXTRA FLAT: At only 1 cm high, the cooling blocks are particularly flat and space-saving, leaving more space for food in the cooler! Daily Practice: Due to its large cooling capacity, a cooler or cooler bag usually only requires a flat cooling element! POWERFUL: The space saving ice batteries are suitable for a temperature range of -18 to +40 ° and can be reused as many times as you want! FOOD SAFETY: In combination with coolers or cooler bags, not only food and drinks, but also medications can be transported fresh! Product Information: Size: about 32 x 25.5 x 1 cm (L x W x H). Weight per battery: about 750g Colour: blue, turquoise, yellow, pink Order the very flat ice cream packs now to keep food and drinks fresh and chilled for longer during your camping or picnics! A review: Colours cannot be freely selected. Colour selection is based on stock and you will receive 2 different colours. Other colour combinations and multiple use of some colours may occur!
